description: LARA/BCC: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2018 as adopted by Michigan.
citation: Michigan Admin Code R 325.1028 / Bureau of Construction Codes

description: LARA/BCC: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear floor area; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
LARA/BCC: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient bed.
LARA/BCC: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
LARA/BCC: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
LARA/BCC: Operating rooms 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
LARA/BCC: All hospital construction in Michigan requires Michigan Department of Licensing and Regulatory Affairs Bureau of Construction Codes plan review and approval.
citation: Michigan Public Health Code Act 368 of 1978 / BCC

description: LARA/BCC: NICU each infant care station minimum 120 sq ft; private NICU room minimum 150 sq ft clear per FGI.
